text: 14. APPROVAL AND PROGRESS DATA: Subcontractor shall carefully examine specification requirements for approval material to be submitted such as shop drawings, data schedules, samples, etc., and then he shall submit such material at his own expense and in such form required by the Prime Contract in sufficient time to prevent any delay in the delivery of such materials and the installation  thereof.  "In-place"  or  "as-built"  drawings  shall  be  prepared  and  submitted  to  Contractor  as  a  condition  of  final payment. Subcontractor shall complete and submit to Contractor if required, on a daily basis, a daily progress report form which will be furnished to Subcontractor by Contractor.
